title: ubuntu 18 podman bash-completion file is installed at wrong place
body:
Hi there,

bash-completion file is installed in directory _comletions_ with missing **p**.

```
$ cat /etc/os-release  | grep -E "^VERSION=|^NAME="
NAME="Ubuntu"
VERSION="18.04.4 LTS (Bionic Beaver)"

$ podman --version
podman version 1.8.2

$ dpkg-query -L podman | grep bash
/usr/share/bash-completion
/usr/share/bash-completion/**comletions**
/usr/share/bash-completion/comletions/podman

```

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

@rhatdan yes

@vbaruh please re-open if this is not fixed.
